---
title: "LAL_DN"
author: "Tomke Stuerner"
date: "13/09/2021"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

1. All DNs with connections in the LAL region
2. Look at the upstream connection to MBON and LHON

There are currently 1325 DNs in the FAFB dataset
```{r DNs, partially typed in flywire}
nrow(DNname)
# 1325 DNs 
load meshes
DN1.fwm=read_cloudvolume_meshes(DNname$post_id[1:10])
```

```{r plot fywire mesh}
nclear3d()
plot3d(DN1.fwm, col='red', lwd=3)
nlscan(DN1.fwm, col = 'black', lwd=2)
# wire3d(DN1.fwm[[1]], col='grey', alpha=.2)
```

```{r LAL mesh}
nrow(DNname)
# 1325
```

```{r DNs in LAL mesh}

```
